'''wanofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachability|coachability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachability|coachability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wanofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wænefeth|wænefeth]] || [[word:wænefej|wænefej]] || [[word:wænefesh|wænefesh]] || [[word:wænefe|wænefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanonofoth|wanonofoth]] || [[word:wanonofoj|wanonofoj]] || [[word:wanonofosh|wanonofosh]] || [[word:wanonofo|wanonofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanofoth|wanofoth]] || [[word:wanofoj|wanofoj]] || [[word:wanofosh|wanofosh]] || [[word:wanofo|wanofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanoffoth|wanoffoth]] || [[word:wanoffoj|wanoffoj]] || [[word:wanoffosh|wanoffosh]] || [[word:wanoffof|wanoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanofotho|wanofotho]] || [[word:wanofojo|wanofojo]] || [[word:wanofosho|wanofosho]] || [[word:wanofoko|wanofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanofoth|wanofoth]] || [[word:wanofoj|wanofoj]] || [[word:wanofosh|wanofosh]] || [[word:wanofo|wanofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanofothol|wanofothol]] || [[word:wanofojol|wanofojol]] || [[word:wanofoshol|wanofoshol]] || [[word:wanofokol|wanofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanofothotho|wanofothotho]] || [[word:wanofojojo|wanofojojo]] || [[word:wanofoshosho|wanofoshosho]] || [[word:wanofoko|wanofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanofothon|wanofothon]] || [[word:wanofojon|wanofojon]] || [[word:wanofoshon|wanofoshon]] || [[word:wanofokon|wanofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanofothoro|wanofothoro]] || [[word:wanofojoro|wanofojoro]] || [[word:wanofoshoro|wanofoshoro]] || [[word:wanofokoro|wanofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
